positive: A minimalist illustration of a celestial gradient: interlocking geometric constellations, stylized with glowing nebula dust and ethereal, abstract star trails. The central composition features a graceful, stylized crescent moon embracing a detailed arrangement of interconnected, glowing geometric stars forming the shape of a mythological beast (e.g., a celestial whale or serpent). Use a high-contrast, single-line art aesthetic combined with gradients. Limited color palette: deep sapphire blues, vibrant magenta neons, and brilliant gold accents. Composition should be centered and easily scalable for printing on apparel. Vector illustration quality, clean silhouette, perfect symmetry, crisp lines, Art Nouveau influence.
negative: blur, grainy, noisy, artifact, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logos, anime, photorealistic, realistic, bad anatomy, cropped, extra limbs, messy, cluttered, busy background
